research_novelty: A finite physical detector sampling profile is mapped into the verified finite detector accounting interface, with aggregate gate compatibility carried as an explicit boundary admissibility invariant.
harder_obstruction_removed: The false pointwise reading-radius route is removed; aggregate gate compatibility is now represented as the exact admissibility boundary rather than incorrectly derived from local pointwise bounds.
does_not_prove: derivation of gate_bound from raw physical readings
arbitrary physical detector fields are admissible
physical detector-field extraction for continuum GR data
